name: 1911 Gold Corporation
summary: 1911 Gold Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and extraction of precious metals. The company primarily explores for gold. It owns interests in the True North mine and mill complex located in Bissett, Manitoba; Ogama-Rockland exploration property located in Manitoba; and Apex property consisting of 5 mining claims covering an area of approximately 752 hectares located near Snow Lake, Manitoba, as well as in Denton-Keefer and Tully projects located near Timmins, Ontario. The company was formerly known as Havilah Mining Corporation and changed its name to 1911 Gold Corporation in June 2019. 1911 Gold Corporation was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
